export_config.applied_to_session: Applied to current session (no file path configured).
export_config.header: Configure custom file extensions and naming templates for import/export operations.
export_config.help_extensions_info:
Extensions must start with a dot (e.g. ".nmsship"). These are used for Save/Open file dialogs alongside standard .json and all-files filters.

The naming template is combined with the extension to produce the default filename shown in export dialogs. Invalid filename characters are automatically removed.
export_config.help_var_type: {type} – Type display name (ship type, frigate type, etc.)
export_config.reset_confirm: Reset all export settings to defaults?
export_config.reset_done: Reset to defaults. Click Save to persist.
export_config.status_applied_no_path: Applied to current session (no file path configured).
export_config.status_reset: Reset to defaults. Click Save to persist.
export_config.title: Export Settings

starship.corvette_primary_corruption:
You are importing/exporting a corvette that
is your current primary ship.
This can cause corruption and is not supported.

Please change to a non-corvette ship as your primary
via the game and then try again.
starship.corvette_primary_warning: Setting a Corvette as primary from the editor is not recommended as Corvettes work weirdly in the game. Continue?
